Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set Two And For The Productions Of Documents
Off Calendar Nov-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Rudy Colombini's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set Two; And Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond and failure to respond fully were a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond and to respond further within 10 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $570, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ronald Souza, Esq. of Lynch, Gilardi & Grummer, 415-397-2800 for defendant and moving party Rudy Colombini
Randall Scarlett, Esq., 415-352-6264 for plaintiff and opposing party Robert Ormiston

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT RUDY COLOMBINI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT SINCE UNDISPUTED THAT WRITTEN CONTRACT'S COMPENSATION TERMS SUPERSEDED BUT TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO OTHER CLAIMS. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189. (301/PJB/PM)

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar May-23-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Lara Hilley, for Defendant/Moving party
Randall H. Scarlett, for Plaintiff/Opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant RUDY COLOMBINI's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Attendance At Deposition is denied. The court finds that the motion was brought without substantial justification and without meeting and conferring. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $750, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2006 Continued To May-26-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition And Request For Reasonable Attorneys Fees, Costs And Sanctions; Declarations Of Ronald J. Souza And Lara S. Hilley In Support
Off Calendar Apr-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Rudy Colombini's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Attendance At Deposition and Request For Sanctions is ordered off calendar and counsel are ordered to meet and confer regarding the scheduling of the parties' depositions. The court acknowledges that there is no discovery priority, but notes that the first served notice of deposition should be considered in scheduling the sequence of the depositions and that Defendant should present himself for deposition first. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
